hero.title: Vehicle Maintenance Tracker
hero.description: A protected workspace for vehicles, service history, maintenance reminders, costs, odometer readings, and monthly upkeep activity.

flow.title: Vehicles → Maintenance → Reminders → Insights
steps: Create vehicle profiles with odometer and identity details
Record service history, cost, category, and notes
Track upcoming and overdue maintenance reminders
Review service frequency, costs, and monthly activity

differences.title: Maintenance memory without repair-shop assumptions
differences.description: Vehicle Maintenance Tracker keeps user-entered upkeep records organized without claiming live diagnostics, mechanic booking, telematics, or insurance decisions.

items.title: Vehicle records
items.description: Save vehicles with make, model, year, plate, odometer, fuel type, status, and notes.

items.title: Service history
items.description: Record oil changes, tire rotations, inspections, repairs, renewals, odometer, providers, costs, and notes.

items.title: Reminder review
items.description: Track upcoming and overdue reminders for oil, tires, inspections, insurance, registration, and general service.

feel.title: A calm maintenance log for everyday vehicles
feel.description: The workflow is designed for owners who want a practical private record before they verify service needs with professionals or official sources.

items.title: Direct
items.description: The first screen opens to vehicles and next upkeep actions.

items.title: Practical
items.description: Costs, odometer values, service categories, and reminders stay visible.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: No diagnostics, repair booking, mechanic marketplace, insurance processing, or telematics are included.

audiences.title: Who uses Vehicle Maintenance Tracker
audiences.description: Vehicle Maintenance Tracker supports people who manage personal, household, or small-group vehicle upkeep records.

items.title: Vehicle owners
items.description: Keep maintenance history, odometer readings, and renewal dates in one place.

items.title: Families
items.description: Coordinate upkeep for more than one household vehicle.

items.title: Frequent drivers
items.description: Review service frequency, upcoming tasks, and maintenance costs over time.

resourceSection.title: Vehicle maintenance essentials
resourceSection.description: The app is a private recordkeeping workflow, not a repair marketplace or diagnostic tool.

items.title: Vehicles
items.description: Profile each vehicle and keep odometer/status information current.

items.title: Maintenance records
items.description: Save service category, date, odometer, provider, cost, next due signals, and notes.

items.title: Reminders
items.description: Track upcoming, overdue, completed, and dismissed maintenance reminders.

groupedSection.title: A simple upkeep workflow
groupedSection.description: Each section supports a specific vehicle maintenance job without expanding into fleet management.

items.name: Vehicles
items.description: Create, edit, duplicate, filter, paginate, and delete vehicle profiles.

items.name: Maintenance
items.description: Create, edit, delete, and review service history by vehicle, category, odometer, and cost.

items.name: Reminders
items.description: Track upcoming and overdue oil, tire, inspection, insurance, registration, and service tasks.

items.name: Insights
items.description: See total vehicles, maintenance records, cost, reminders, service frequency, and monthly activity.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with the Ansiversa platform model
technicalSection.description: Vehicle Maintenance Tracker follows protected mini-app routing, isolated API data, generated API types, and shared shell navigation.
items: Owner-scoped backend records in isolated tables.

finalCta.title: Open Vehicle Maintenance Tracker
finalCta.description: Start with vehicles, then record maintenance, reminders, and upkeep insights.
